Generated Narrative: ValueSet v2-notAllCodes-0347

This value set includes codes based on the following rules:

  • Include these codes as defined in urn:iso:std:iso:3166:-2 version ⏿2021
    CodeDisplay
    CA-ABAlberta
  • Include these codes as defined in urn:iso:std:iso:3166:-2 version ⏿2021

    US-MIMichigan

name: Hl7VsStateProvince
title: HL7 Value Set for State/Province
description: Concepts used to specify a state or province.  Used in Version 2 messaging in the Extended Composite ID with Check Digit (CX), Performing Person Time Stamp (PPN), and Extended Composite ID Number and Name for Persons (XCN) values as well as the Accident (ACC) segment.
